## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is rebased on the latest `main`.
- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (format, lint, type-check, tests).
- [ ] New shared dependency versions are added to the root `package.json` `catalog` and referenced with `"catalog:"`.
- [ ] Drizzle schema changes include regenerated migrations under `apps/api/drizzle/`.
- [ ] No `console.log`, `debugger`, or unrelated formatting churn.
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `AGENTS.md`) updated if behaviour or setup changed.
